payload.label: chair
payload.short_description: dark carved wooden chair, partial crop
payload.long_description: A dark reddish-brown wooden chair with an ornate carved crest and vertical spindles on the back, turned front legs and stretcher visible; lower legs and edges are partly cut off by the crop — approximate distance to camera ~1.5 m.
